recommendations.title: The Strange Color of Your Body's Tears
recommendations.overview: Returning home from a business trip to discover his wife missing, a man delves deeper and deeper into a surreal kaleidoscope of half-baked leads, seduction, deceit, and murder.

recommendations.title: Let the Corpses Tan
recommendations.overview: With a heavy haul of 250 kilograms of gold bullion, the grizzled criminal mastermind, Rhino, and his ruthless gang of cutthroats, head to a ramshackle retreat somewhere in the Mediterranean to lay low on a scorching day of July. However, the unexpect

recommendations.title: 4bia
recommendations.overview: Four directors create short films based on unique fears involving a lonely woman, a princess's corpse, a haunted camping trip and a cursed manuscript.
recommendations.director: Parkpoom Wongpoom, Yongyoot Thongkongtoon, Banjong Pisanthanakun, Paween Purijitpanya

recommendations.title: Pee Mak
recommendations.overview: Mak's friends just want to protect him, but his wife Nak won't let a small thing like her own death get in the way of true love.

recommendations.title: Cold Skin
recommendations.overview: A young man who arrives at a remote island finds himself trapped in a battle for his life.

recommendations.title: Totem
recommendations.overview: A teen must resort to extreme measures to protect her family from a supernatural entity.

recommendations.title: V/H/S: Viral
recommendations.overview: As the streets of Los Angeles overflow with camera-wielding gawkers seeking to capture images of a bizarre police pursuit, the same people who sought to exploit the suffering of others for amusement on the Internet become the stars of a gruesome vira
recommendations.director: Nacho Vigalondo, Marcel Sarmiento, Gregg Bishop, Justin Benson, Todd Lincoln, Aaron Moorhead

recommendations.title: Timecrimes
recommendations.overview: A man accidentally gets into a time machine and travels back in time nearly an hour. Finding himself will be the first of a series of disasters of unforeseeable consequences.

recommendations.title: Alone
recommendations.overview: When Pim and Ploy, twins conjoined at the stomach, are separated, the operation leaves Pim the surviving sister, haunted by Ploy's vengeful ghost.
